findings.title: vllm-project/vllm
findings.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs

findings.title: ray-project/ray
findings.description: Ray is an AI compute engine. Ray consists of a core distributed runtime and a set of AI Libraries for accelerating ML workloads.

findings.title: sgl-project/sglang
findings.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.

findings.title: Tiiny-AI/PowerInfer
findings.description: High-speed Large Language Model Serving for Local Deployment

findings.title: InternLM/lmdeploy
findings.description: LMDeploy is a toolkit for compressing, deploying, and serving LLMs.

findings.title: flashinfer-ai/flashinfer
findings.description: FlashInfer: Kernel Library for LLM Serving

findings.title: kvcache-ai/Mooncake
findings.description: Mooncake is the serving platform for Kimi, a leading LLM service provided by Moonshot AI.

findings.title: SylphAI-Inc/LLM-engineer-handbook
findings.description: A curated list of Large Language Model resources, covering model training, serving, fine-tuning, and building LLM applications.

findings.title: lm-sys/RouteLLM
findings.description: A framework for serving and evaluating LLM routers - save LLM costs without compromising quality

findings.title: skyzh/tiny-llm
findings.description: A course of learning LLM inference serving on Apple Silicon for systems engineers: build a tiny vLLM + Qwen.

findings.title: ModelTC/LightLLM
findings.description: LightLLM is a Python-based LLM (Large Language Model) inference and serving framework, notable for its lightweight design, easy scalability, and high-speed performance.

findings.title: sgl-project/mini-sglang
findings.description: A compact implementation of SGLang, designed to demystify the complexities of modern LLM serving systems.

findings.title: PaddlePaddle/FastDeploy
findings.description: High-performance Inference and Deployment Toolkit for LLMs and VLMs based on PaddlePaddle

findings.title: alpa-projects/alpa
findings.description: Training and serving large-scale neural networks with auto parallelization.

findings.title: michaelfeil/infinity
findings.description: Infinity is a high-throughput, low-latency serving engine for text-embeddings, reranking models, clip, clap and colpali

findings.title: georgia-tech-db/evadb
findings.description: Database system for AI-powered apps

findings.title: containers/ramalama
findings.description: RamaLama is an open-source developer tool that simplifies the local serving of AI models from any source and facilitates their use for inference in production, all through the familiar language of containers.

findings.title: lemonade-sdk/lemonade
findings.description: Lemonade helps users discover and run local AI apps by serving optimized LLMs right from their own GPUs and NPUs. Join our discord: https://discord.gg/5xXzkMu8Zk

findings.title: young-geng/EasyLM
findings.description: Large language models (LLMs) made easy, EasyLM is a one stop solution for pre-training, finetuning, evaluating and serving LLMs in JAX/Flax.

findings.title: ray-project/llm-applications
findings.description: A comprehensive guide to building RAG-based LLM applications for production.
